parameters.query:
INSERT INTO chat_sessions (id, ip_hash, consent_given, last_activity, metadata)
VALUES ('{{ $json.session_id }}'::uuid, '{{ $json.ip_hash }}', true, NOW(), 
  '{"page_url": "{{ $json.page_url }}", "user_agent": "{{ $json.user_agent }}"}'::jsonb)
ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET last_activity = NOW()
RETURNING id;

parameters.jsCode:
const validateData = $('Validate Input').first().json;
return [{ json: validateData }];

parameters.query: SELECT role, content FROM chat_messages WHERE session_id = '{{ $json.session_id }}'::uuid ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 10;
SELECT category, title, content, url FROM knowledge_base ORDER BY category;

INSERT INTO chat_messages (session_id, role, content, source_type) VALUES ('{{ $json.session_id }}'::uuid, 'user', '{{ $json.user_message.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.source_type }}');
INSERT INTO chat_messages (session_id, role, content, intent) VALUES ('{{ $json.session_id }}'::uuid, 'assistant', '{{ $json.reply.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.intent }}');

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ reply: $('Parse Response').first().json.reply, session_id: $('Parse Response').first().json.session_id, suggested_actions: ['Beratungstermin vereinbaren'] }) }}
